_metadata.scoring_rule: judge verdict is aligned when it matches expected exactly; PARTIAL is treated as a separate category, not a partial credit between COHERENT and INCOHERENT
_metadata.design_notes: Each sample's expected verdicts are anchored to the specific evidence in its transcript. Reasoning fields cite the turn / phrase the judge should ground the verdict in. The aim is unambiguous expected verdicts so judge alignment is fairly measurable.

B1.reasoning: Phase 0 problem (weekday lunch slow + audience confusion office/freelancer) maps to Phase 2 positioning (premium business retreat for office workers needing weekday refresh) — both threads addressed.

B2.reasoning: Premium business retreat positioning + Caregiver archetype (restorative warm professional) align — Caregiver is appropriate for restoration-of-mental-state core promise.

B3.reasoning: Caregiver voice (warm-professional) maps to Phase 4 messaging tone (workday stories, professional warmth, not boastful); content pillars match.

B4.reasoning: Channels (FB office-radius, LinkedIn senior office worker, Google Maps Local SEO) measured by KPIs (FB office-zone reach, LinkedIn qualified engagement, weekday lunch occupancy via Google) — channel-KPI match.

B5.reasoning: Phase 2 cites Phase 1 white space; Phase 5 KPIs explicitly trace Phase 0 problem (weekday + office worker) per agent's own framing 'mình design KPI để measure đúng vấn đề Phase 0'.

B6.reasoning: Agent narrates visual rationale before creative-studio dispatch: earth tones (warm beige + soft terracotta + deep green) + gold accent + serif/sans-serif duality + WHY each choice (restorative not clinical, restraint not show-off, modern duality).

B7.reasoning: Agent narrates 8 DOCX sections with strategic argument before document-generator dispatch: section flow follows journey diagnosis to strategy to execution.

B8.reasoning: Agent narrates 12 PPTX slide arc explicitly: Hook to Problem (weekday gap) to Insight (mental restoration framing) to Solution to Why (Caregiver fit) to How to KPIs to Roadmap to Closing ask.

B9.reasoning: Each KPI has measurement method + baseline + target + cadence + linkage to Phase 0 problem (e.g. weekday lunch occupancy current 35-40 percent target 65 percent measured daily POS reviewed weekly).

B10.reasoning: Caregiver archetype + premium business retreat + warm-professional voice are consistent across positioning, identity, communication, and KPI framing — no contradictions across agent's statements about each artifact.

B11.reasoning: Vietnamese F&B + office worker context language used correctly throughout (Q1, business retreat, workday); no inappropriate Western framing.

B12.reasoning: No internal contradictions: premium business retreat consistently maintained across positioning + identity + channels + KPIs.

B1.reasoning: Phase 0 problem (4 new competitors + weak family identity differentiation) maps to Phase 2 positioning (di sản truyền thống for gia đình hiện đại) — addresses both share loss and family differentiation.

B2.reasoning: Di sản truyền thống positioning + Sage archetype (wisdom of tradition + family warmth) align — Sage is appropriate for 30-year recipe heritage.

B3.reasoning: Sage voice (kể chuyện, không khoe khoang) maps to Phase 4 messaging tone (story-telling, family memories, lễ Tết warmth).

B4.reasoning: Channels (FB community Vinhomes Grand Park, Zalo OA, lễ Tết offline) measured by KPIs (Zalo subscriber growth, family booking 4-pax, weekend dine-in) — channel-KPI match.

B5.reasoning: Phase 5 KPIs explicitly anchor to Phase 0 problem (mất share + family); agent says 'mình design KPI để measure đúng vấn đề Phase 0'.

B6.reasoning: Agent narrates visual rationale: wood tones + serif Vietnamese + script handwriting + WHY each (gợi tuổi thơ thật, tránh red-yellow Việt cliche).

B7.reasoning: Agent narrates DOCX 8 sections with flow rationale before dispatch.

B8.reasoning: Agent narrates PPTX 12-slide arc: Hook to Problem (4 quán mới mở) to Insight to Solution to Why (Sage fit) to How to KPIs to Roadmap.

B9.reasoning: KPIs include current baseline + target + measurement + cadence (e.g. family booking current 30/tháng target 50/tháng đo qua POS booking review weekly).

B10.reasoning: Sage archetype + di sản + family theme consistent across positioning, identity, communication, KPI.

B11.reasoning: Vietnamese F&B + lễ Tết + di sản language correct; demographic framing (gia đình hiện đại, urban district) accurate to context.

B1.reasoning: Phase 0 (premium executive cocktail bar for C-suite) maps to Phase 2 positioning (premium executive cocktail bar discreet venue) — narrow chain holds.

B2.reasoning: Phase 2 positioning (premium executive discreet venue for C-suite host khách quan trọng) directly contradicts Phase 3 archetype (Jester — irreverent humor + neon Y2K + breaking conventions). Executive premium audience does not align with Jester brand voice — fundamental archetype mismatch.

B3.reasoning: Within the Jester frame, Phase 4 channels (TikTok meme + Instagram Y2K reel + Gen Z micro-creator) match Jester voice — narrow archetype-to-communication chain holds even though the archetype itself is wrong upstream.

B4.reasoning: Phase 5 KPIs (TikTok views + IG engagement + meme shares + influencer reach) measure the Phase 4 channels (TikTok + IG + influencer) — narrow channel-KPI match holds.

B5.reasoning: Agent introduces Phase 3 Jester archetype with no reference to Phase 0 customer (C-suite + senior management) or Phase 1 white space (executive discreet venue). Phase 5 KPIs do not cite Phase 0 problem (executive booking conversion). Cross-phase reasoning chain absent.

B6.reasoning: Visual choices stated with WHY (neon pink + electric yellow + black + Y2K + graffiti typography for 'energy and disruption from corporate boredom + breaking conventions') but the chosen aesthetic does not fit a premium executive cocktail bar serving C-suite for discreet meeting venue — visible-but-unfit rationale fails the linkage to brand promise per sharpened rubric.

B7.reasoning: Agent dispatches document-generator without narrating any DOCX section structure or strategic argument flow.

B8.reasoning: Agent dispatches document-generator without narrating PPTX slide arc.

B9.reasoning: KPIs (TikTok views + IG engagement + meme shares + influencer reach) have target and cadence but no baseline AND track social-channel vanity rather than the diagnosed executive booking + meeting venue problem — methodology incomplete on baseline AND visible-but-unfit on linkage; both branches of B9 INCOHERENT criterion satisfied per sharpened rubric.

B10.reasoning: Phase 2 declares premium executive discreet venue while Phase 3 declares Y2K Jester and Phase 5 measures meme shares — three different brand identities across artifacts; cross-artifact contradiction.

B11.reasoning: Executive premium F&B for C-suite host khách quan trọng requires sophisticated register; Gen Z meme TikTok language register fundamentally mismatched with stated audience.

B12.reasoning: Direct internal contradiction: Phase 2 says discreet sophisticated venue for executives + Phase 3-4-5 says irreverent meme TikTok Jester for Gen Z; cannot both be true for same brand.

B1.reasoning: Phase 0 problem is specific (weekday lunch slow + 2 new competitors stealing lunch share). Agent reframes Phase 0 as 'build brand strategy for awareness + differentiation in F&B Q3' which drops both the weekday timing component and the named-competitor component. Phase 2 positioning (điểm đến ẩm thực Q3 cho khách hàng tìm kiếm trải nghiệm chất lượng) addresses neither weekday gap nor competition — generic premium framing not linked to problem.

B2.reasoning: Within the generic premium frame, Lover archetype (passion + indulgence) does match the positioning (trải nghiệm chất lượng đáng nhớ); narrow internal chain holds.

B3.reasoning: Lover voice (warm sensory inviting) matches Phase 4 messaging (mỗi bữa ăn là trải nghiệm đáng nhớ + Instagram aesthetic food photography); narrow chain holds.

B4.reasoning: 3 of 4 KPIs measure their respective channels (IG followers ↔ IG, FB engagement ↔ FB, Google review ↔ Google Business) but 'brand awareness survey' KPI is not tied to a specific channel; chain is mostly aligned but weak.

B5.reasoning: Phase 5 KPIs do not cite Phase 0 weekday lunch problem at all; Phase 2 positioning does not cite Phase 1 findings. Cross-phase reasoning chain to problem-of-record absent.

B6.reasoning: Agent presents Phase 3 archetype + visual ('warm red + cream + gold, romantic candlelight') without narrating WHY before dispatch; no design rationale visible.

B7.reasoning: Agent dispatches document-generator with no DOCX section structure narration.

B8.reasoning: Agent dispatches document-generator with no PPTX slide arc narration.

B9.reasoning: KPIs (brand awareness survey + IG follower + FB engagement + Google review) mostly lack baseline AND track vanity proxies rather than the diagnosed weekday-lunch-occupancy + competitor-share problem — methodology incomplete on baseline AND visible-but-unfit on linkage per sharpened rubric.

B10.reasoning: Lover + premium quality brand voice consistent within strategy across positioning + identity + KPIs. However the artifacts describe a strategy disconnected from Phase 0 problem — not a contradiction within strategy itself but artifacts will not solve user's stated problem.

B11.reasoning: Vietnamese F&B language used correctly (Q3, bistro, ẩm thực, trải nghiệm đáng nhớ); register appropriate for premium segment.

B12.reasoning: No internal contradictions within the stated strategy frame; the issue is orthogonality to Phase 0 problem (covered by B1) not internal contradiction.

B1.reasoning: Phase 0 has two threads: (1) brand confusion specialty vs regular café, (2) competition cao with 5 named competitors. Phase 2 positioning addresses thread 1 (specialty positioning rõ ràng cho discerning urban professionals) but does NOT address thread 2 — no white space identification, no POD that differentiates from the 5 named competitors, no competitive positioning.

B2.reasoning: Specialty craft positioning + Sage archetype (wisdom of craft + share knowledge) align — Sage is appropriate for educational specialty positioning.

B3.reasoning: Sage voice (knowledgeable but not gatekeeping, share story origin) maps to Phase 4 messaging (mỗi ly là câu chuyện) + content pillars (origin 40 + craft 30 + community 30) — chain aligned.

B4.reasoning: KPIs (brand awareness, IG follower, workshop attendance, retention) match Phase 4 channels (IG + YouTube + workshop offline) on the channel side, but missing competitive positioning measurement (no KPI for 'differentiation vs 5 named competitors').

B5.reasoning: Phase 2-3-4 chain visible (positioning cites craft, identity cites positioning, channels cite identity) but Phase 5 KPIs do not explicitly cite Phase 0 competition thread — the dropped problem component cascades through cross-phase reasoning.

B6.reasoning: Agent narrates visual rationale before creative-studio dispatch: earth tones (raw bean brown + cream + deep green) + serif/sans duality + WHY (craft truthfulness not Instagram-aesthetic, learned but accessible).

B7.reasoning: Agent says 'DOCX gồm các sections theo phase output' — generic, no narration of section flow rationale or strategic argument per section.

B8.reasoning: Agent says 'PPTX flow theo strategy' — generic, no narration of slide arc (Hook → Problem → Insight → Solution structure).

B9.reasoning: Each KPI has baseline (current 0 / current 0 noted) + target + cadence + measurement method (survey, IG analytics, workshop attendance count, retention tracking).

B10.reasoning: Sage + specialty + craft consistent across positioning + identity + communication + KPIs (within the gaps noted).

B11.reasoning: Specialty coffee + Q1 + Vietnamese F&B language correct; urban professional register matches stated audience.

B12.reasoning: No internal contradictions across phases within the stated strategy frame.
